memberdef.argsstring: (double tStart, double tEnd, double tolAbsErr, double tolRelErr)
memberdef.name: executeDMP

memberdef.argsstring: (double t, const double *y, double *dfdy, double *dfdt, void *params)
memberdef.name: jac

memberdef.argsstring: (double t, const double *currentDesiredYs, int jointNumber, KUKADU_SHARED_PTR< ControlQueue > queue)
memberdef.name: addTerm

memberdef.argsstring: (double tStart, double tEnd, double tolAbsErr, double tolRelErr)
memberdef.name: simulateTrajectory

memberdef.argsstring: (double t, const double y[], double f[], void *params)
memberdef.name: static_func

memberdef.argsstring: (double t, const double y[], double *dfdy, double dfdt[], void *params)
memberdef.name: static_jac

memberdef.argsstring: (StorageSingleton &dbStorage, KUKADU_SHARED_PTR< Dmp > dmp, KUKADU_SHARED_PTR< ControlQueue > execQueue, int suppressMessages=1)
memberdef.name: DMPExecutor

parameterdescription.para: the dmp that should be executed

memberdef.argsstring: (StorageSingleton &dbStorage, int skillId, KUKADU_SHARED_PTR< ControlQueue > execQueue, int suppressMessages=1)
memberdef.name: DMPExecutor

memberdef.argsstring: (double maxAbsForce, double maxXForce, double maxYForce, double maxZForce)
memberdef.name: enableMaxForceMode

briefdescription.para: This class is responsible for dmp execution.

detaileddescription.para: The DMPExecutor computes the evolution of the dynmic movement primitives by using a numerical differential equation solver. It provides execution and simulation mode. If the execution mode is selected, a control queue has to be passed to constructor.
